sections.paragraph:
-

(1) pr. to shine, to be bright, like Arabic نَاَض Med. Waw, compare נָצַץ and נִיצֹוץ a spark. It is applied-

(2) to the signification of flourishing (compare זָחָה, זִו see Hiph.), and-

(3) to that of fleeing, Lam 4:15 Arabic ناص, compare דָּרַר No. 1, 2, and Lat. micare.

Hiphil הֵנֵץ to flourish, Son 6:11 7:13 . (In Targg. אֲנִיץ id.).

From the cognate verb נָצַץ (which see) are derived the nouns נֵץ, נִצָּה, נִצָּן.
